summary: Convert SKILL.md metadata.openclaw from a JSON string scalar to nested YAML with a Go install manifest.
reason: Codex skill discovery expects frontmatter metadata to deserialize as a structured map. The previous quoted JSON blob made metadata a string and caused the pp-redfin skill to be skipped during load.
validated_outcome: Parsed SKILL.md frontmatter as YAML and confirmed metadata is a map with metadata.openclaw.requires.bins and metadata.openclaw.install[0].kind/module/bins.
